topics_to_register.title: Blockchain Fundamentals: Internet Computing and Decentralization
topics_to_register.description: Learning path for Blockchain Fundamentals Lecture 1 — 11 concepts covering Web evolution, blockchain basics, consensus, decentralization, and ecosystem

topics_to_register.title: Evolution of the Web: 1.0 → 2.0 → 3.0
topics_to_register.description: Understand the 3-stage evolution of the Web, the transition from Stateless to Stateful, and the ownership revolution.

topics_to_register.title: Blockchain Fundamentals
topics_to_register.description: Learn the basic structure of blockchain, asymmetric cryptography, hash functions, and State Machine concepts.

topics_to_register.title: Consensus Mechanisms: PoW vs PoS
topics_to_register.description: Learn the principles of PoW and PoS, The Merge, Nothing at Stake problem, and Slashing.

topics_to_register.title: Double Spending Problem and Necessity of Consensus
topics_to_register.description: Learn the essence of double spending, why time-based ordering doesn't work, and how PoW/PoS solve it.

topics_to_register.title: Lifecycle of Centralized Platforms
topics_to_register.description: Learn Chris Dixon's 3-stage lifecycle of centralized platforms and the Google case study.

topics_to_register.title: Bait-and-Switch: Platform Betrayal
topics_to_register.description: Learn the concept of bait-and-switch, historical examples, and its consequences.

topics_to_register.title: Voice and Exit: Solutions Through Decentralization
topics_to_register.description: Learn Voice (voting rights) and Exit (right to leave), the concept of Fork, and how decentralization prevents bait-and-switch.

topics_to_register.title: Wikipedia vs Encarta: Triumph of Decentralization
topics_to_register.description: Learn the Wikipedia and Encarta case study, dynamic process comparison, and the lesson of late blooming.

topics_to_register.title: Layer 2: Solving Scalability
topics_to_register.description: Learn the blockchain trilemma, Layer 2 principles, and Optimistic/ZK Rollups.

topics_to_register.title: DeFi and NFTs: The Blockchain Ecosystem
topics_to_register.description: Learn DeFi concepts and history, NFTs, CBDC, and lessons from the FTX collapse.

topics_to_register.title: Ethereum and Smart Contracts
topics_to_register.description: Learn Ethereum's innovation, EVM, Gas, and smart contract principles.
